Title: S1-01 PostgreSQL real-world test matrix
Description:
# S1-01 - PostgreSQL real-world test matrix

## Sprint
Sprint 1

## Problem
Define and run matrix across local/remote/high-latency/lock-contention/large-table PostgreSQL scenarios.

## Expected Outcome
Matrix documented and executed with pass/fail evidence for each scenario.

## Scope
- In scope: Define and run matrix across local/remote/high-latency/lock-contention/large-table PostgreSQL scenarios.
- Out of scope: unrelated feature additions and non-MVP enhancements.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Matrix documented and executed with pass/fail evidence for each scenario.
- [ ] No regression on existing behavior covered by the same area.
- [ ] User-facing error/loading states remain deterministic.

## Validation
- Attach scenario logs and findings in a markdown report.
- Run: npm run build
- Run: cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml

## Dependencies
None

## Risks
Environment variability can hide intermittent failures.

## Notes
- Track progress against docs/mvp-sprint-backlog.md.
- Link implementation PR and test evidence before closing.
